name: numtype
description: NumType — n-dimensional arrays for TypeScript with compile-time shape checking (research spike)

scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --manifest-path crates/core/Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && mkdir -p spike/src/wasm && cp crates/core/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/numtype_core.wasm spike/src/wasm/numtype_core.wasm
